description.value:
This small tearing of a devil's wing has been cleansed with holy water before being mounted onto a silver badge. The spell attack modifier of any spell cast by Activating this item is +19, and the spell DC is 29.

  • Armor You gain resistance 5 to fire and unholy.
  • Weapon After you cast a spell by Activating the devilwing badge, your Strikes with the weapon deal an additional 1d8 spirit damage until the end of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.Effect: Devilwing Badge (Armor)]

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.Effect: Devilwing Badge (Weapon)]

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Divine Lance].

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day

Effect You cast 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Crisis of Faith].

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day

Effect You cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Divine Wrath].
